sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this sports title

special_mechanics.name: Golf Ball Physics
special_mechanics.description: Sports game featuring golf ball trajectory and distance mechanics. Regional versions use different measurement units (meters in JP/EU, yards in US)

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Available source (TCRF) contains no documented movement physics parameters, gravity values, or jump mechanics. Game is a sports title (not action-platformer), so traditional player movement parameters do not apply. Only regional localization differences (distance measurement units) are documented.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Golf (NES, Famicom Disk System)
